name: Neubrutalism
description: Internet-native neubrutalism: bright white canvas, thick 3px black borders, hard offset solid-black shadows (no blur), a hot magenta accent, chunky Space Grotesk, and a faint black dot grid. Playful and loud — best for bold product launches, design/dev tools and trend-forward brands.
descriptionZh: 互联网原生新粗野风: 纯白底 + 3px 厚黑边 + 硬实色黑色偏移阴影(无模糊) + 品红强调色 + 粗壮 Space Grotesk + 淡黑点阵. 张扬好玩, 适合大胆的产品发布、设计 / 开发者工具与潮流品牌.
